data.content: Fixed the installer stale-launcher edge by honoring FOOLERY_LAUNCHER_PATH when writing the launcher, so upgrades/reinstalls can refresh custom/channel launchers instead of always targeting $BIN_DIR/foolery. Added src/lib/__tests__/install-launcher-path.test.ts to source the installer without running main, write the launcher through an override path, and assert the generated launcher lands at the override path with the safe printf '%s' '->' tip icon. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-9df0: bash -n scripts/install.sh; bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/install-launcher-path.test.ts; bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
